---
title: "Decision Modeling in R Workshop"
subtitle: "Decision trees, Markov models, microsimulation, and sensitivity analysis"
---

::: {.hero}
Welcome to the workshop website. This site contains preparation modules, live-session materials, code demonstrations, coding exercises, homework, and post-workshop resources.
:::

## Workshop dates

- **June 25, 2026:** Decision trees and Markov models
- **June 26, 2026:** Microsimulation modeling
- **June 27, 2026:** Sensitivity analysis

## Expected workload

On workshop days, participants will spend approximately **5-6 hours in live interactive sessions**. We recommend investing an additional **2-4 hours per day** to review material and complete exercises.

## Suggested daily schedule

- Preparation modules with video lectures: **1-2 hours**
- Live interactive sessions with code demonstrations and coding exercises: **approximately 6 hours daily**
- Completion of homework assignments: **1-2 hours**

## Start here

1. Review the [Getting Started](getting-started.qmd) page.
2. Complete the [Pre-workshop Preparation](prework/index.qmd) modules before **June 25, 2026**.
3. Run the [Setup Check](prework/setup-check.qmd).
4. Download the workshop repository or use the online coding option provided by the instructors.
